title: Commit metadata to base branch (.tick/ and .devmeta/)
description:
## Objective
After merge, .tick/ and .devmeta/ files modified during orchestration live on the base branch as uncommitted changes (they were never in the feature PR). Commit them directly on the base branch.

## Implementation
1. `git checkout s2-win-probability` (already there from previous task).
2. `git status --short` — expect only metadata files (.tick/*, .devmeta/*, possibly tsconfig.tsbuildinfo).
3. `git add .tick/ .devmeta/` (and tsconfig.tsbuildinfo if present).
4. `git status --short` — verify ONLY metadata staged.
5. `git commit -m \"DevMeta: metadata snapshot after iteration 2.1\"`
6. `git push`.

## Tests
`git status` returns clean tree.
acceptance_criteria: git status clean on s2-win-probability after metadata commit
closed_reason: Metadata committed as 69817d3 to s2-win-probability and pushed. Working tree clean.
